destinations.evidence: The cache stores Option<ModelInfo>, so both found models and not-found None results are cached without changing the registry lookup result.
LLM pricing resolves the exact decoded model name through the cached registry reader and still errors when the model is absent; executor metadata is explicitly ignored during response decoding.
The public fee calculation path threads ModelCache into LLM pricing and rejects unsupported fee paths rather than falling back to unrelated metadata.

equivalence_argument: The v2 port preserves the registry-read semantics by caching the exact Option<ModelInfo> returned by read_model_from_db. LLM pricing uses the decoded model name as the cache key, rejects None as a missing-model error, and does not consult executor-supplied pricing metadata; using the cache changes storage-read frequency only.
notes: The implementation maps directly in ritual-async-fees; cache entries include both found and absent models.
rationale: The diff threads `ModelCache` through `calculate_async_fees` and `compute_llm_executor_fee`, but the resolver still requires exact on-chain model names and returns an error for missing models. The cache stores both found and not-found lookup results, so repeated reads avoid storage without changing pricing decisions. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Cached LLM fee calculation must return the same result as direct ModelPricingRegistry reads, including exact model-name matching, caching `None` for not-found models, and still erroring/skipping when a model is absent rather than falling back to executor metadata.
suggested_falsification_tests: For a known model, compare fees computed with an empty cache, a pre-populated cache, and direct storage reads; assert identical fees. For an unknown model, assert the first lookup returns the same missing-model error as direct reads and inserts `None`, and a second lookup returns the same error without another storage read.
summary: LLM registry pricing cache preserves exact direct-read behavior.
test_or_falsification_candidate: For a known model, compare fees computed with an empty cache, a pre-populated cache, and direct storage reads; assert identical fees. For an unknown model, assert the first lookup returns the same missing-model error as direct reads and inserts `None`, and a second lookup returns the same error without another storage read.
title: Cached LLM pricing preserves exact registry behavior
